newsletter.title: Newsletter Sponsorship
newsletter.subtitle: Reach 5,000+ engaged subscribers with our daily newsletter. Perfect for building brand awareness and driving customer action.

benefits.title: Daily Reach
benefits.description: Your message goes to 5,000+ subscribers every single day

benefits.title: Engaged Audience
benefits.description: Average 35% open rate with high click-through engagement

benefits.title: Full Analytics
benefits.description: Track opens, clicks, and conversions in real-time

faqItems.question: How often does my sponsorship appear?
faqItems.answer: Your sponsorship appears at the top of every CityBeat Daily newsletter sent during your campaign period. We send one newsletter each morning.

faqItems.question: Can I change my sponsorship message?
faqItems.answer: Yes! You can update your sponsorship message, logo, and link at any time through your dashboard. Changes are reflected in the next day's newsletter.

faqItems.question: What are typical open rates?
faqItems.answer: CityBeat Daily averages a 35% open rate with 8-12% click-through rate on sponsored links. This is well above industry averages for local newsletters.

faqItems.question: Is there a minimum commitment?
faqItems.answer: No! You can sponsor for just one month if you want to test it out. Many of our sponsors renew after seeing the results.

faqItems.question: Can I target specific neighborhoods?
faqItems.answer: Our newsletter reaches across all of El Paso County, Horizon, Socorro, Clint, and Las Cruces. We don't offer neighborhood-level targeting, but you can filter by subscriber location in your analytics.

sponsored.title: Sponsored Posts
sponsored.subtitle: Feature your content directly in our news feed. Reach thousands of engaged readers across El Paso County.

benefits.title: Direct Content
benefits.description: Your content appears alongside editorial posts in our news feed

benefits.title: Analytics
benefits.description: Track views, clicks, and engagement on your sponsored content

benefits.title: Targeted
benefits.description: Choose content categories to reach your ideal audience

faqItems.question: What is a sponsored post?
faqItems.answer: A sponsored post is promotional content created by you that appears in our news feed alongside editorial content. It's clearly labeled as sponsored and reaches all our readers across El Paso County and surrounding areas.

faqItems.question: Who writes the content?
faqItems.answer: You provide the content, and our editorial team reviews it for quality and brand alignment. We can also help you write the post for an additional fee.

faqItems.question: How long does content stay live?
faqItems.answer: Sponsored posts remain featured for 7 days from publication. After that, they're archived but remain accessible on your company profile.

faqItems.question: What analytics are included?
faqItems.answer: You'll get access to a dashboard showing views, unique visitors, click-through rates, and engagement metrics for your content.
